---

* 
Article 29(2)6 of the Enforcement Decree of the Higher Education Act.
International 
Admissions II
(재외국민과외국인전형)
    Applicants  must  have  completed  a  full  regular  curriculum  
equivalent  to  elementary,  middle,  and  high  school  entirely  
outside Korea.
    Applicants  must  have  graduated  or  be  expected  to  graduate,  
from a high school outside Korea by August 31, 2026.
 
* 
Article 29(2)7 of the Enforcement Decree of the Higher Education Act.
Global Korea 
Scholarship
(GKS)

---

Fall 2026 & Spring 2027
2829

FALL 2026
(재외국민과외국인전형)
III

Eligibility
   Applicants who have completed their entire standard education curriculum  
      OUTSIDE KOREA must satisfy all of the following criteria:
➊
  
Completion  of  an  education  program  equivalent  to  Korea’s  full  elementary  and  
secondary education (grades 1–12), entirely outside Korea
.
➋
